hero.subheadline: exempliphai uses one private profile to auto-search roles, tailor your resume, autofill applications, and track every application end-to-end — without selling your data.
hero.privacyNote: Full anonymization. You stay in control of what gets shared.

features.title: Everything you need to go from search → offer.
features.subtitle: Stop juggling job boards, spreadsheets, and copy/paste. exempliphai automates the busywork so you can focus on interviews.

items.title: Auto-search & smart matches
items.description: Tell us your target roles, location, and dealbreakers. We continuously surface relevant jobs and filter out noise.

items.title: Resume tailoring in one click
items.description: Generate a job-specific resume version, highlight missing keywords, and keep your core story consistent.

items.title: Autofill + auto-apply flows
items.description: Autofill repetitive questions, reuse verified answers, and speed through forms with fewer errors.

items.title: List mode for batch apply
items.description: Queue jobs, batch-tailor resumes, and knock out applications in focused sprints.

items.title: Job tracking that doesn’t drift
items.description: Bookmark roles from multiple boards, track status, deadlines, notes, and follow-ups in one place.

items.title: AI Q&A for every posting
items.description: Ask: “Why am I a fit?”, “What should I emphasize?”, “What gaps should I address?” — and get actionable answers.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple, repeatable workflow you can run every day — without burnout.

steps.title: Create one private profile
steps.description: Import your resume once. Add your target roles, preferences, and dealbreakers — we’ll keep it up to date.

steps.title: Auto-search and shortlist
steps.description: We continuously find roles that match your criteria and present them in a clean list for quick decisions.

steps.title: Auto-tailor + prep your story
steps.description: Tailor your resume to each job and use AI Q&A to craft strong, consistent answers for applications and interviews.

steps.title: Apply fast and track everything
steps.description: Autofill forms, reduce retyping, and automatically track what you applied to — so follow-ups are easy.

testimonials.title: Real momentum, not just more tabs.
testimonials.subtitle: Job seekers use exempliphai to move faster with less chaos — and keep their data private.

items.quote: I stopped losing opportunities to missed deadlines. The tracker + batch apply flow is a game changer.
items.name: Maya R.

items.quote: The resume tailoring is fast, but what surprised me most was the Q&A — it helped me explain my experience clearly.
items.name: Jordan K.

items.quote: I used to spend 25 minutes per application. Now it’s closer to 5–10 with autofill and saved answers.
items.name: Sam T.

items.quote: List mode makes it feel like a workout set. Pick 10 roles, tailor, apply, done.
items.name: Elena V.

items.quote: Auto-search brought me roles I wouldn’t have found. It’s like having an assistant that actually listens to my dealbreakers.
items.name: Chris P.

items.quote: Finally a job tool that’s privacy-first. No creepy retargeting, no data selling.
items.name: Nina S.

faq.title: Got questions?
faq.subtitle: Quick answers before you get started.

items.a: exempliphai includes a free plan with core job search, tracking, and autofill tools. We may offer optional paid tiers for advanced automation and AI features.
No. We do not sell personal data. We minimize what we collect, anonymize wherever possible, and you control what information is used for applications.
Based on your preferences (roles, location/remote, seniority, compensation, keywords, exclusions), we continuously scan supported sources and surface matches in a shortlist you can review.
We generate a job-specific version of your resume that emphasizes the most relevant experience and keywords, while keeping your facts and formatting consistent.

items.q: Can exempliphai auto-apply to jobs for me?
items.a: exempliphai can streamline applying with autofill and guided flows. Where full auto-apply is available, you’ll always be able to review before submission.
Only if you explicitly choose to share it. By default, your profile is private and used to personalize matches and tailor documents.
